title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 99.230 - Effect of sections 99.010 to 99.230
text:
99.230.  Effect of sections 99.010 to 99.230. — Insofar as the provisions of sections 99.010 to 99.230 are inconsistent with the provisions of any other law, the provisions of sections 99.010 to 99.230 shall be controlling.
(RSMo 1939 § 7875)
